name: showcase-everything
description: A guided tour of v2.6–v2.9 in one workflow: cron trigger, http.request v2 (headers + status + response headers), a gate (conditional halt), llm.prompt (local Ollama), the sample-plugin delay, and matrix.send — with templating across steps + a connection reference. PREREQS: Matrix/Llm/SamplePlugin plugins installed, a connection named 'matrix' (accessToken), Ollama running with qwen2.5:3b (or change baseUrl/model), and your room id in the last step. Hit 'Run now' to try it immediately; the cron trigger also runs it daily at 09:00.

config.system: You are witty and terse. One short sentence, no preamble.
